sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INTEGER, event_date DATE);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_date) VALUES (1, DATE '1992-02-15');
SELECT id, quarter(event_date) AS event_quarter FROM test_dates;
UPDATE test_dates SET event_date = DATE '1992-06-01' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, quarter(event_date) AS updated_event_quarter FROM test_dates WHERE event_date > DATE '1992-01-01';
